betOfDay.analysis: Jokic and the Nuggets are at home against a Lakers team on a back-to-back road stretch. Ball Arena is a fortress — Denver is 14-5 ATS at home this season. The line opened at -4 and has been bet up to -4.5, showing sharp action on Denver. Lakers without full rest, Nuggets playing their best basketball of the year. This is a layup.

picks.reasoning: Nuggets at home vs Lakers on road. Jokic dominant, consensus -4.5 line. Sharp money on Denver all week.
Rockets rolling at home, Warriors struggling on the road. Toyota Center crowd will be huge. Line consensus at -4.5 to -5.5 across books.
Wolves at home against one of the worst teams in the East. Anthony Edwards should have a big night. Consensus -4.5 to -5.5.
Suns playing motivated basketball at home, Bulls on a road trip and shorthanded. Consistent -11.5 to -12 line across all books.
Flames heavy favorites at home against a weak Senators team. Scotiabank Saddledome crowd, Flames playing well. Strong consensus at -175 to -186.
Islanders big road favs (-230 to -250 ML). Getting +195 on the puck line is excellent value — means Isles win by 2+ at nearly even odds.
